violations.text: Thermometers are lacking in the retail refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

The ceiling in the kitchen area above the prep table is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. The appropriate tiles are on site. Tiles to be moved over to prep area. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the single door reach-in and lowboy have an accumulation of bio-film. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storag area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024
Holes were observed in the wall underneath the 3-bay sink and in the back storage area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
Rodent droppings were observed in both back storage areas. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024
The ceiling in the prep area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024
